role: Co-founder of Freedom Movement of Iran; revolutionary cleric
bio: Liberal Shia cleric who co-founded the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) alongside [Mehdi Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan) and [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi). Imprisoned multiple times (4 arrests, over 11 years total) under the Pahlavi regime. Served in the provisional government after the [1979 revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Known for progressive interpretations of Islam and support for democratic governance. In August 1979, he was the highest vote-getter in Tehran Province in the election for the [Assembly of Experts for the Constitution](/orgs/assembly-of-experts-for-constitution), receiving over 2 million votes. He died on 9 September 1979, during the assembly's sessions, removing a key moderate voice from the constitutional debates.
editorial_notes: Died September 1979, just months after the revolution. Suspicious circumstances alleged by some.
